onboarding.subtitle: A few quick details help us personalize your readings. It takes less than a minute.

onboarding.locationStepSubtitle: Birth time and city help deepen your readings a little more.
onboarding.birthTimeHint: Birth time is optional, but it makes the reading stronger.
onboarding.birthDateRequired: Please choose your birth date to continue.

coffee.photoInstructions: Take 3 clear photos showing the inside of your coffee cup. The coffee residue at the bottom of the cup is important for fortune telling.
coffee.galleryPermissionRequired: Photo gallery access permission is required.
coffee.imageSelectionFailed: An error occurred while selecting the image.
coffee.traditionalGroundsDigital: Digital fortune with traditional grounds interpretation
coffee.optionalQuestionPlaceholder: Optional: What would you like the reading to focus on most?
coffee.optionalQuestionHint: If you write a question, the interpretation will lean toward that topic. If you leave it empty, we will read the cup more generally.
coffee.photo1Description: The clearest angle of the grounds inside the cup.
coffee.photo2Description: Show the shapes forming along the cup walls.
coffee.photo3Description: Capture the dense grounds at the bottom closely.
coffee.coffeeFortuneDescription: Turkish coffee fortune is a world-famous traditional fortune type. It provides information about the future by interpreting the coffee grounds remaining at the bottom of the cup after drinking coffee.
coffee.rightSideDesc: Events and opportunities in the near future
coffee.tip1: Take clear photos showing the inside of the cup
coffee.tip3: Coffee grounds should be clearly visible
coffee.tip4: Include the bottom of the cup
coffee.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
coffee.disclaimerText: This reading is for entertainment purposes and should not affect your real-life decisions.
coffee.fileSizeTooLarge: Selected image is too large! Image will be automatically resized.
coffee.fileSizeInfo: Images are resized to 800x800 and compressed.

tarot.tarotDescription: Tarot is an ancient guidance system built around a 78-card deck, using symbols and archetypes to interpret your energy. The cards you choose are read together with your intention to offer insight into love, career, inner balance, and the near future.
tarot.tarotSubtitle: Hold your intention... and select your cards!
tarot.intentStepTitle: Set your intention, then draw your cards
tarot.intentStepDescription: You can write your question or leave this step empty. On the next screen, you will choose your cards from the deck one by one.
tarot.intentStepDescriptionPremium: You can write your question or intention. For premium members, this field makes the reading directly focus on the question.
tarot.intentStepDescriptionFree: In the free spread, we interpret the general energy of the cards. Question-focused tarot interpretation is included in premium membership.
tarot.questionPremiumTitle: Question-focused reading is a Premium feature
tarot.questionPremiumDescription: Upgrade to premium to ask a question and receive a more targeted tarot interpretation.
tarot.selectionSubtitle: Choose your three-card spread from the deck. If you change your mind, tap a selected card above to return it to the deck.
tarot.selectionShortSubtitle: Choose your three-card spread from the deck.
tarot.selectionDeckSubtitle: For this spread, you will draw your cards from a single deck. Each tap brings the reading one step closer.
tarot.secondCardPrompt: Let the second card complete the energy
tarot.thirdCardPrompt: Let the final card seal the meaning
tarot.cardsReadyPrompt: Your spread is ready for interpretation
tarot.tapSelectedCardToReturn: If you change your mind, tap any selected card above to return it to the deck.
tarot.swipeDeckHint: Swipe the deck to choose a card
tarot.tapDeckToDraw: Tap the deck to draw your next card
tarot.intentionDescription: You can write your question or intention. This helps make your fortune more accurate.
tarot.intentionPlaceholder: Example: What will my love life be like?
tarot.cardsDescription: Select {{count}} cards. After selecting your cards, we will interpret your fortune.
tarot.tarottip1: You need to select exactly 3 cards
tarot.tarottip3: Your selected cards represent past, present and future
tarot.max3CardsWarning: You can select a maximum of 3 cards. Click again to remove a card first.
tarot.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
tarot.tarotDeckDescription: The tarot deck consists of 78 cards and is divided into two main sections:
tarot.majorArcanaDescription: Cards representing great mysteries. They show life's fundamental lessons and important turning points. Cards like The Fool, The Magician, The Empress, The Sun, The Moon are in this group.
tarot.minorArcanaDescription: Cards representing the details of daily life. They are divided into four suits:
tarot.cardPositionsDescription: Tarot cards can appear in two positions:
tarot.uprightCardDescription: Shows the normal meaning of the card. Usually represents positive or neutral energies.
tarot.reversedCardDescription: Shows that the card's energy is blocked or indicates difficulties. Points to issues that need attention.
tarot.howItWorksDescription: In tarot fortune, 3 cards are selected and each card's meaning is interpreted in relation to your question. The interaction between the cards is also important.
tarot.note1: Tarot fortune doesn't predict the future, it provides guidance
tarot.note2: Card meanings are interpreted with personal experiences
tarot.note3: Positive thinking and open mind are important
tarot.disclaimerText: This reading is for entertainment purposes and should not affect your real-life decisions.

daily.dailyZodiacSubtitle: Today's astrology reading according to your zodiac sign
daily.infoDescription: Get today's detailed astrology reading for your zodiac sign, automatically calculated based on your birth date. Daily astrological advice on love, career, health and finance topics.
daily.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a daily fortune reading for this date before. You can see the result from your profile page.
daily.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
daily.personalAstrologicalGuide: Personal astrological guide for each day
daily.dailyZodiacDescription: Daily zodiac reading is an astrological analysis system that shows how your zodiac characteristics, determined according to your birth date, will be affected that day. Personal advice is provided taking into account daily planetary movements and astrological aspects.
daily.dailyLuckyColorNumberStone: Daily lucky color, number and stone
daily.birthDateDesc: We determine your zodiac sign by entering your birth date
daily.birthDateRequired: Required for zodiac and Chinese element calculation
daily.astrologicalAnalysisDesc: Current planetary positions and your zodiac characteristics are analyzed
daily.personalCommentDesc: Special advice and predictions for that day are provided
daily.twelveZodiacsDesc: We offer daily comments for 12 zodiac signs: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius and Pisces. Each sign has its own characteristics and daily astrological influences differ.
daily.importantNoteDesc: Daily horoscope comments are for entertainment and guidance purposes. Do not make important decisions based solely on horoscope comments. Astrology should be used to add a different perspective to your life.

kabala.kabalaSubtitle: Spiritual interpretation with Hebrew mystical tradition
kabala.nameHebrewHint: Your name will be converted to Hebrew letters
kabala.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
kabala.kabalaDescription: Kabala is the foundation of Hebrew mystical tradition and has a history of approximately 2000 years. It means "Received" or "Tradition" and is used to discover spiritual wisdom.
kabala.hebrewNumerologyDescription: Each Hebrew letter has a numerical value. Your spiritual meaning emerges through the conversion of your name to Hebrew letters and the calculation of the sum of these letters.
kabala.sefirotDescription: There are 10 sefirot in Kabala, each representing a different spiritual energy:
kabala.treeOfLifeDescription: The Sefirot are arranged in a structure known as the "Tree of Life" (Etz Chaim). This tree shows the structure of the spiritual world and the path of human spiritual development.

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.subtitle: Discover your number map through your name and birth date
numerology.originText: A personal reading through an ancient number system
numerology.description: Numerology is an ancient system that reads the vibration of numbers hidden in your name and birth date to interpret your direction, inner motivation, and life themes.
numerology.sectionNumbersBody: Life Path, Destiny, Soul Urge, and Personality numbers are interpreted together. This helps reveal both your outer style and your inner emotional drive.
numerology.howWorksBody: The letters in your name and the digits in your birth date are calculated according to classic numerology rules. The resulting core numbers are then read as one complete story.
numerology.feature1Body: Your Life Path, Destiny, and Soul Urge numbers appear together in one flow.
numerology.feature2Body: Your emotional needs, intuition, and deeper motivation become easier to understand.
numerology.feature3Body: You receive a short but meaningful direction for your current cycle.
numerology.tip1: Write your name in the form you use most in daily life.
numerology.tip2: Entering the correct birth date improves the quality of the reading.
numerology.tip3: If you want a richer interpretation, the premium layer provides deeper insight.
numerology.name: Name
numerology.birthDateHint: Required to calculate the Life Path number
numerology.profileReadyBody: When you choose “For me”, your saved name and birth date are used directly from your profile. You can still switch to another person anytime.
numerology.duplicateRequestInfo: You already received a numerology reading with this information. You can view it again from your profile.

compatibility.title: Compatibility Reading
compatibility.subtitle: Discover the emotional rhythm and balance between two people
compatibility.description: Compatibility reading compares the core number patterns and relationship theme of two people to reveal the strongest bonds, tension points, and natural communication rhythm between them.
compatibility.sectionFlowBody: The names and birth dates of both people are compared through their main energetic lines. This makes the emotional, mental, and intuitive flow of the connection much easier to see.
compatibility.sectionInsightBody: Emotional harmony, communication style, attraction, and sensitive areas are interpreted together. The result works for romance, friendship, or a general connection.
compatibility.feature1Body: See the shared rhythm of two people through one compatibility score and level label.
compatibility.feature2Body: Conversation style, emotional closeness, and energetic attraction open up in separate layers.
compatibility.feature3Body: Patterns that may challenge the relationship and areas that need care become clearer.
compatibility.tip1: Enter the names in the form they are used most often in daily life.
compatibility.tip2: The more accurate the birth dates, the clearer the compatibility layer becomes.
compatibility.tip3: Choosing the right relationship type improves the tone of the interpretation.
compatibility.name: Name
compatibility.enterFirstName: Please enter the first person's name.
compatibility.selectFirstBirthDate: Please select the first person's birth date.
compatibility.enterSecondName: Please enter the second person's name.
compatibility.selectSecondBirthDate: Please select the second person's birth date.
compatibility.duplicateRequestInfo: You already received a compatibility reading for these two people. You can view it again from your profile.

angelNumbers.title: Angel Numbers
angelNumbers.subtitle: Not a fortune reading, but a short sign from the universe
angelNumbers.description: Angel numbers are repeating number sequences seen as short spiritual signs. This space is designed to deliver a quick and clear signal for the day, not a long fortune reading.
angelNumbers.dailySignalBody: A short number sign appears for you each day. It hints at the emotional tone of the day and what deserves your attention.
angelNumbers.dailySignalCta: Open today’s message and feel its energy
angelNumbers.shareFeatureBody: You can turn the meaning of your number into a short share card and send the energy of the day as a story or message.
angelNumbers.invalidNumber: Please enter a 3 or 4 digit number.
angelNumbers.duplicateRequestInfo: You recently received a reading for this number. Check the latest result before requesting the same message again.
angelNumbers.pickNumberTitle: Choose the Number You Keep Seeing
angelNumbers.helper: Pick or type the number that keeps appearing to you. This area creates a short, clear, and shareable message instead of a long reading.
angelNumbers.tip1: Using numbers that keep appearing in your day usually creates a stronger reading.
angelNumbers.tip2: This area is designed to generate short, shareable messages.

yildizname.yildiznameSubtitle: Detailed astrology reading with your birth information
yildizname.name: Name
yildizname.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
yildizname.invalidTimeFormat: Invalid time format. Please enter in HH:MM format.
yildizname.turkishAstrologySystem: A rooted astrology system of Turkish culture
yildizname.yildiznameDescription: Yildizname is an astrology system with a deep-rooted tradition in Turkish culture. A person's character, future, and life path are analyzed using information such as date of birth, time, place, and mother's name. It originated from the blending of Islamic astrology and Turkish culture.
yildizname.dateTimeLocationUsed: Date, time, and place information is used
yildizname.howToReadDescription: For Yildizname fortune, birth date, time, place, and mother's name are required. With this information, an astrology chart is created and detailed interpretation is made.
yildizname.yildiznametip3: Learn your birth time if possible
yildizname.disclaimerText: This reading is for entertainment purposes and should not affect your real-life decisions.

rune.runeSubtitle: Discover your future with ancient Viking runes
rune.questionDescription: The runes are waiting for your question to guide you. You can ask about love, career, health, or any other topic.
rune.questionPlaceholder: Example: What opportunities will I have in my career next month?
rune.runetip2: Each rune has a special meaning
rune.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
rune.writeDetailedQuestion: Please write a more detailed question (at least 10 characters)
rune.mysticalFortuneViking: Mystical fortune with ancient Viking runes
rune.runeFortuneDescription: Rune fortune is a mystical fortune type that comes from ancient Viking culture. The future is read with the 24-letter Elder Futhark alphabet. Each rune letter has its own unique meaning and power. Runes provide guidance for both daily life and major decisions.
rune.howToReadDescription: For rune fortune, a question is asked and 3 runes are selected. Runes have a 30% chance of appearing reversed. Each rune has its own unique meaning and different interpretation when reversed.
rune.rune2tip2: Don't forget the possibility of runes appearing reversed
rune.rune2tip3: Read the meaning of each rune carefully
rune.disclaimerText: This reading is for entertainment purposes and should not affect your real-life decisions.

chinese.duplicateRequestInfo: You have had a fortune reading with this information before. You can see the result from your profile page.
chinese.invalidTimeFormat: Invalid time format. Please enter in HH:MM format.
chinese.baZiDescription: Ba Zi (Eight Characters) is the fundamental system of Chinese astrology. A person's element balance is analyzed using birth year, month, day, and time. Character and future are interpreted through five elements (Metal, Water, Wood, Fire, Earth) and Yin-Yang balance.
chinese.howToReadDescription: For Chinese fortune, birth date and time are required. With this information, element balance is calculated and Yin-Yang analysis is performed. The strongest element and compatible elements are determined.
chinese.bazi2tip2: Learn your birth time if possible
chinese.disclaimerText: This reading is for entertainment purposes and should not affect your real-life decisions.

notifications.specialDayNotificationsDesc: Get notified on New Year, Valentine's Day, and seasonal turning points
notifications.birthdayNotificationsDesc: Receive special notification on your birthday
notifications.marketingNotificationsDesc: Get informed about special campaigns and discounts
notifications.settingsInfo: You can change your notification settings at any time. Daily reading, daily angel number, premium expiry, birthday, and selected special day settings update instantly.
